content: Early player, Lv 44, trying our best to cobble a Poison Team for Astral Reign (mostly for the GMurphy event), but the end result doesn't feel right and we still had to use one Emergency Gnosis. How should we go about it?

You could try using a whale support GDoll, Nymph, Agrippa and Faint with a shitton of DR. But with the low application of poison you're probably dealing with, since I wouldn't recommend overinvesting in them for this event, I think you would have a better time borrowing a whaled out DPS like Tawil, Kath, GHelot or Castor to just burst the enemy down

i tried to do a lil research via kaiden.gg and was looking to pull these 2 since they're good together and i like them. would they be the upcoming banners in 6 hours if i'm understanding this correctly?

yes the first one will come after reset and the last guy on sunday. Kath, the woman inbetween the two is a way better dps than Doresain though if that's mostly what you're looking for. If you just want those two based off their looks and vibes you can make them work fine tho

So I should probably really go for GMurphy huh. Should I go for anyone else? I don't think I have a proper Aqueor DPS, well if Goliath is counted but a lot say he's mostly supportive. Here's my updated roster. And should I start building a 2nd team? I'm using the twins with Hameln/Winkle or GRamona cuz I saw someone do it in D-Tides.
thread_title: New Player - Team Building and Pull Plan

content: GMurphy, especially E2 and upwards is a great aequor dps. Her and castor work well together, but you can make her your team focus building around her, making her pretty much the best dps there is rn
thread_title: New Player - Team Building and Pull Plan

content: you'll only really need multiple teams for playing D-Tide. Looking at your levels right now, resources should still be tight for you, so just upgrade and invest into what you're actually using for story. You can start building for D-Tide later down the line, once you've "completed" A team.
thread_title: New Player - Team Building and Pull Plan

content: Also yeah Goliath is a support. he's pretty much only used for his 1-cost.
thread_title: New Player - Team Building and Pull Plan

content:
Also looking at D-Tide for team reference is a good start, but keep in mind, that those will most likely not be the best version of the team, since there's usually a better support for that team used in another team. 
Also the very top spots are super unrelateable because they've only got maxed characters making them perform way better than they'll most likely do for you.
thread_title: New Player - Team Building and Pull Plan

content: Thank you! I currently have her E2 close to E3. But I'd probably have her on her own team with Lemurians. I prefer using Castor with Pollux. I'll focus on building Castor/Pollux team then. Is there a better alternative to her so I can either wait or get them instead?
thread_title: New Player - Team Building and Pull Plan

content: Also sorry for asking a lot of questions. I really wanna keep playing this game but it is a fair bit confusing. 😭
thread_title: New Player - Team Building and Pull Plan

content:
Pretty sure the funny numbers on Pollux' 3-Cost card mostly stem from Castors corrosion, so it's mostly Castors damage attributed to Pollux.
I don't use pollux that much since I'm mostly using other teams but where I did try the combo, I liked **Winkle** the most as a partner, since she can give Castor more exalts and then for the last spot I either use **Clem, Horla, Jenkins or Erika**. You can use Hemeln there though. If you find it difficult to cycle through your deck for some reason you could use **Cassiah** to draw cards with her 1-cost and ultimate as a direct replacement for GRamona. But you should usually be able to get your rouses in hand by turn 2, epecially since Castors corrosion can draw you cards unless you're supremely unlucky.
Also note, that while Erika is good, you shouldn't invest in her copies just yet, since Aurita and Aigis copies are much more valuable than hers.
Also Hemeln works really good in pretty much any team, but his personal best team is with Tawil, which is where he'll most likely eventually end up for your D-Tide.
thread_title: New Player - Team Building and Pull Plan

content: I would also not suggest you pulling for Clem over GMurphy copies, her Wheel or Castor Wheel btw. She is a decent support/ subdps, but I usually ended up using Horla or Jenkins over Clem for most scenarios. Clem's wheel is really good though and worth picking up at least one copy.
thread_title: New Player - Team Building and Pull Plan

content: tl;dr Winkle, Horla, Jenkins, Clem, or Erika can replace your Hemeln and GRamona eventually.
thread_title: New Player - Team Building and Pull Plan
